ACIDOSIS.name: ACIDOSIS
ACIDOSIS.description: Acidosis treated with insulin IV. Calculated during ETL (PH se 7.3, BICARBONATE se 10, Insulin IV within 2h of PH)

ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER.name: ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER
ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER.description: Raw concept to mark the acute respiratory disorder event, inputed from 'Observation'

ADMISSION.name: ADMISSION
ADMISSION.description: Raw concept to mark the admission event

ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.name: ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE
ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE

ALBUMIN_MEASURE.name: ALBUMIN_MEASURE
ALBUMIN_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of ALBUMIN by serum, for g/dL units

ANTIBIOTIC_IV_BITZUA.name: ANTIBIOTIC_IV_BITZUA
ANTIBIOTIC_IV_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark antibiotic drugs administration event (IV/SC/IM - more severe)

ANTIBIOTIC_PO_BITZUA.name: ANTIBIOTIC_PO_BITZUA
ANTIBIOTIC_PO_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark antibiotic drugs administration event (oral - less severe)

ANTIDIABETIC_HOME_BITZUA.name: ANTIDIABETIC_HOME_BITZUA
ANTIDIABETIC_HOME_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark antidiabetic PO drugs administration event (at home, signaling valuable context) that have high hypoglycemia risk (used only to monitor if were stopped during the first 3 days or after event)

ANTIDIABETIC_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.name: ANTIDIABETIC_HOSPITAL_BITZUA
ANTIDIABETIC_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark antidiabetic PO drugs administration event (in hospital) that have high hypoglycemia risk (used only to monitor if were stopped during the first 3 days or after event)

ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.name: ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE
ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE for U/L units

ATHEROSCLEROSIS.name: ATHEROSCLEROSIS
ATHEROSCLEROSIS.description: Raw concept to mark the atherosclerosis event, inputed from 'Observation'

BASAL_BITZUA.name: BASAL_BITZUA
BASAL_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to manage the administration of BASAL (long term) insulin, which is SubCutaneous by default

BASAL_HOME_BITZUA.name: BASAL_HOME_BITZUA
BASAL_HOME_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark basal medication administration event (at home, signaling valuable context) that the patient is already treated routinely at home

BASE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE.name: BASE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE
BASE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage base GLUCOSE level derived from glucose tolerance or HBA1C calculated glucose level

BICARBONATE_BITZUA.name: BICARBONATE_BITZUA
BICARBONATE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark calcium-bicarbonate administration event (IV only)

BICARBONATE_MEASURE.name: BICARBONATE_MEASURE
BICARBONATE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BICARBONATE in units of mmol/l

BLOOD_PRESSURE_DIASTOLIC_MEASURE.name: BLOOD_PRESSURE_DIASTOLIC_MEASURE
BLOOD_PRESSURE_DIASTOLIC_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BLOOD_PRESSURE in DIASTOLIC measure for mmHg units

BLOOD_PRESSURE_SYSTOLIC_MEASURE.name: BLOOD_PRESSURE_SYSTOLIC_MEASURE
BLOOD_PRESSURE_SYSTOLIC_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BLOOD_PRESSURE in SYSTOLIC measure in mmHg units

BMI_MEASURE.name: BMI_MEASURE
BMI_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BMI

BODY_TEMPERATURE_MEASURE.name: BODY_TEMPERATURE_MEASURE
BODY_TEMPERATURE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage base BODY TEMPERATURE (units Celsius)

BOLUS_BITZUA.name: BOLUS_BITZUA
BOLUS_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to manage the administration of BOLUS (short term) insulin, assumed to be SubCutaneous by default (many DB mismatches there)

CALCIUM-GLUCONATE_BITZUA.name: CALCIUM-GLUCONATE_BITZUA
CALCIUM-GLUCONATE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark calcium gluconate administration event

CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER.name: CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER
CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER.description: Raw concept to mark a cardio-vascular disorder event, inputed from 'Observation'

CREATINE-KINASE_MEASURE.name: CREATINE-KINASE_MEASURE
CREATINE-KINASE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of creatine kinase in Serum (U/L, no MB measurement)

CREATININE_SERUM_MEASURE.name: CREATININE_SERUM_MEASURE
CREATININE_SERUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of CREATININE by Serum using mg/dL units

DEATH.name: DEATH
DEATH.description: Raw concept to mark the death event

DEXTROSE_BITZUA.name: DEXTROSE_BITZUA
DEXTROSE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark dextrose administration event (IV only)

DIABETES_DIAGNOSIS.name: DIABETES_DIAGNOSIS
DIABETES_DIAGNOSIS.description: Raw concept to mark the diabetes diagnosis event

DIABETIC_COMA.name: DIABETIC_COMA
DIABETIC_COMA.description: Raw concept to mark the coma event, inputed from 'Observation'

E-GFR_MEASURE.name: E-GFR_MEASURE
E-GFR_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of E-GFR in units of ml/min/1.73m² or similar. Programatically calculated using the GFR MDRD formula + uses declared measurements of correct units

GLUCOSE_MEASURE.name: GLUCOSE_MEASURE
GLUCOSE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of GLUCOSE in units of mg/dL

HEART_RATE_MEASURE.name: HEART_RATE_MEASURE
HEART_RATE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of HEART_RATE in units of BpM

HEMATOCRIT_MEASURE.name: HEMATOCRIT_MEASURE
HEMATOCRIT_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of HEMATOCRIT in units of %

HEMOGLOBIN_MEASURE.name: HEMOGLOBIN_MEASURE
HEMOGLOBIN_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of HEMOGLOBIN in units of g/dL

HEPARIN_IV_BITZUA.name: HEPARIN_IV_BITZUA
HEPARIN_IV_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark heparin administration event (IV - more severe)

HEPARIN_SC_BITZUA.name: HEPARIN_SC_BITZUA
HEPARIN_SC_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark heparin administration event (SC - less severe)

HIGH_GLUCOSE_IND.name: HIGH_GLUCOSE_IND
HIGH_GLUCOSE_IND.description: Raw concept to indicate the transition to high glucose range in admission

HYPERGLYCEMIA.name: HYPERGLYCEMIA
HYPERGLYCEMIA.description: Raw concept to mark the hyperglycemia event, inputed as 'Observation'

HYPEROSMOLALITY.name: HYPEROSMOLALITY
HYPEROSMOLALITY.description: Raw concept to mark the hyperosmolality event, inputed as 'Observation'

HYPERTONIC-SALINE_BITZUA.name: HYPERTONIC-SALINE_BITZUA
HYPERTONIC-SALINE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark hypertonic saline administration event (IV only)

HYPOGLYCEMIA.name: HYPOGLYCEMIA
HYPOGLYCEMIA.description: Raw concept to mark the hypoglycemia event, inputed as 'Observation'

INFECTION.name: INFECTION
INFECTION.description: Infection event. Calculated during ETL based on clinical and laboratory data indicating infection presence.

INFECTION_WBC_MEASURE.name: INFECTION_WBC_MEASURE
INFECTION_WBC_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of WHITE BLOOD CELLS for infection determination in units of 10³/µL (LEUKOCYTES)

INSULIN_BITZUA.name: INSULIN_BITZUA
INSULIN_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to manage the administration of regular insulin, which is IntraVenous by default

K-BINDER_BITZUA.name: K-BINDER_BITZUA
K-BINDER_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark potassium binder administration event (oral/ rectal route)

KETOACIDOSIS.name: KETOACIDOSIS
KETOACIDOSIS.description: Raw concept to mark the ketoacidosis event, inputed from 'Observation'

KETONES_SERUM_MEASURE.name: KETONES_SERUM_MEASURE
KETONES_SERUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of KETONES by SERUM in mg/dL units

KETONES_URINE_MEASURE.name: KETONES_URINE_MEASURE
KETONES_URINE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of KETONES by URINE in mg/dL units

KIDNEY_COMPLICATION.name: KIDNEY_COMPLICATION
KIDNEY_COMPLICATION.description: Raw concept to mark the kidney complication event, inputed from 'Observation', creatinine and e-GFR measures

LOW_GLUCOSE_IND.name: LOW_GLUCOSE_IND
LOW_GLUCOSE_IND.description: Raw concept to indicate the transition to low glucose range in admission

MEAL.name: MEAL
MEAL.description: Raw concept to manage the assessed meal events in hospitalization

METFORMIN_HOME_BITZUA.name: METFORMIN_HOME_BITZUA
METFORMIN_HOME_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark METFORMIN drugs administration event (at home) that have low hypoglycemia risk (but we'll want to monitor this)

METFORMIN_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.name: METFORMIN_HOSPITAL_BITZUA
METFORMIN_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark METFORMIN drugs administration event (at hospital) that have low hypoglycemia risk (but we'll want to monitor this)

NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER.name: NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER
NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER.description: Raw concept to mark the nervous system disorder event, inputed as 'Observation'

NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION.name: NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION
NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION.description: Raw concept to mark the neurovascular complication event, inputed as 'Observation'

NEUTROPHILS_MEASURE.name: NEUTROPHILS_MEASURE
NEUTROPHILS_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of Absolute NEUTROPHILS count (ANC) in units of 10e3/uL

NORMAL_GLUCOSE_IND.name: NORMAL_GLUCOSE_IND
NORMAL_GLUCOSE_IND.description: Raw concept to indicate the transition to normal glucose range in admission

OTHER_COMPLICATION.name: OTHER_COMPLICATION
OTHER_COMPLICATION.description: Raw concept to mark an unidentified diabetic complication event, inputed from 'Observation'

PH_MEASURE.name: PH_MEASURE
PH_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood PH (units of mmHg or mg/dL)

PLT_MEASURE.name: PLT_MEASURE
PLT_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood PLT (in units of 10e3/uL)

POTASSIUM_MEASURE.name: POTASSIUM_MEASURE
POTASSIUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood POTASSIUM (K⁺) in units of mmol/L

RELEASE.name: RELEASE
RELEASE.description: Raw concept to mark the release event

RETINOPATHY.name: RETINOPATHY
RETINOPATHY.description: Raw concept to mark the retinopathy event, inputed from 'Observation'

SGLT2_HOME_BITZUA.name: SGLT2_HOME_BITZUA
SGLT2_HOME_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark SGLT2 drugs administration event (at home, signaling valuable context) that have high hypoglycemia risk (used only to monitor if were stopped during the first 3 days or after event)

SGLT2_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.name: SGLT2_HOSPITAL_BITZUA
SGLT2_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark SGLT2 drugs administration event (at hospital, signaling valuable context) that have high hypoglycemia risk (used only to monitor if were stopped during the first 3 days or after event)

SKIN_ULCER.name: SKIN_ULCER
SKIN_ULCER.description: Raw concept to mark the skin ulcer event, inputed from 'Observation'

SODIUM_MEASURE.name: SODIUM_MEASURE
SODIUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of SODIUM (Na⁺) by serum/ blood/ plasma in units of mmol/L

STEROIDS_IV_BITZUA.name: STEROIDS_IV_BITZUA
STEROIDS_IV_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark steroids administration event (IV - more severe)

STEROIDS_PO_BITZUA.name: STEROIDS_PO_BITZUA
STEROIDS_PO_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark steroids administration event (PO - oral route)

TROPONIN_MEASURE.name: TROPONIN_MEASURE
TROPONIN_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of TROPONIN in units of ng/L

UREA_MEASURE.name: UREA_MEASURE
UREA_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood/ serum/ plasma UREA in units of mg/dL

WEIGHT_MEASURE.name: WEIGHT_MEASURE
WEIGHT_MEASURE.description: Raw concept for measurement of WEIGHT (in KG), used to assess proper medication dosages

BASAL_BITZUA_RATIO.name: BASAL_BITZUA_RATIO
BASAL_BITZUA_RATIO.description: Raw concept to manage the BASAL ratio (long term) compared to the last administered dose

BOLUS_BITZUA_RATIO.name: BOLUS_BITZUA_RATIO
BOLUS_BITZUA_RATIO.description: Raw concept to manage the BOLUS ratio (short term) compared to the last administered dose

CREATININE_REL_SERUM_MEASURE.name: CREATININE_REL_SERUM_MEASURE
CREATININE_REL_SERUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to monitor the creatinine trend within admission, if 2 or more exist, compared to baseline

CREATININE_RISE_SERUM_MEASURE.name: CREATININE_RISE_SERUM_MEASURE
CREATININE_RISE_SERUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to monitor the creatinine numerical increase within admission, if 2 or more exist

M-SHR_MEASURE.name: M-SHR_MEASURE
M-SHR_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the temporal measurement of M-SHR ratio (glucose / base glucose measure)

STEADY_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_HIGH_AFTER_FIRST.name: STEADY_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_HIGH_AFTER_FIRST
STEADY_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_HIGH_AFTER_FIRST.description: Raw concept that outputs only the glucose measurements after the first high glucose measurement (meaning it's repetative if high)

STEADY_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_LOW_AFTER_FIRST.name: STEADY_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_LOW_AFTER_FIRST
STEADY_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_LOW_AFTER_FIRST.description: Raw concept that outputs only the glucose measurements after the first low glucose measurement (meaning it's repetative if low)

ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER_EVENT.name: ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER_EVENT
ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER_EVENT.description: Marks Acute Respiratory Disorder (in admission complication) event

ANTIBIOTIC_BITZUA_EVENT.name: ANTIBIOTIC_BITZUA_EVENT
ANTIBIOTIC_BITZUA_EVENT.description: Marks Antibiotic Drugs administration event (IV or PO)

ANTIDIABETIC_BITZUA_EVENT.name: ANTIDIABETIC_BITZUA_EVENT
ANTIDIABETIC_BITZUA_EVENT.description: Marks Antidiabetic Drugs administration event in hospital (PO) - High hypoglycemia risk medications

CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER_EVENT.name: CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER_EVENT
CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER_EVENT.description: Marks Cardiovascular Disorder (in admission complication) event

DIABETIC_COMA_EVENT.name: DIABETIC_COMA_EVENT
DIABETIC_COMA_EVENT.description: Marks Diabetic Coma (in admission complication) event

DISGLYCEMIA_EVENT.name: DISGLYCEMIA_EVENT
DISGLYCEMIA_EVENT.description: Dysglycemia event (only after the 2nd unstable event or extreme measurement)

HEPARIN_BITZUA_EVENT.name: HEPARIN_BITZUA_EVENT
HEPARIN_BITZUA_EVENT.description: Marks Heparin administration event (IV - more severe)

NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER_EVENT.name: NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER_EVENT
NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER_EVENT.description: Marks Nervous System Disorder (in admission complication) event

NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION_EVENT.name: NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION_EVENT
NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION_EVENT.description: Marks Neurovascular Complication (in admission complication) event

OTHER_COMPLICATION_EVENT.name: OTHER_COMPLICATION_EVENT
OTHER_COMPLICATION_EVENT.description: Marks Other Complication (in admission complication) event

SKIN_ULCER_EVENT.name: SKIN_ULCER_EVENT
SKIN_ULCER_EVENT.description: Marks Skin Ulcer (in admission complication) event

ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE_STATE.description: Abstraction for the measurements of ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE

ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE_STATE.description: Abstraction for the measurements of ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE

BASAL_BITZUA_STATE.description: Abstraction for the dosage and route of administration of BASAL insulin (SC by default)

UREA_MEASURE_TREND.description: Trend for the measurements of UREA

ANTIDIABETIC_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.name: ANTIDIABETIC_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT
ANTIDIABETIC_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.description: Context to identify if antidiabetic medication administration at home is chronic, which will affect compliance patterns

BASAL_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.name: BASAL_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT
BASAL_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.description: Context to identify if basal medication administration at home is chronic, which will affect compliance patterns

HIGH_GLUCOSE_CONTEXT.name: HIGH_GLUCOSE_CONTEXT
HIGH_GLUCOSE_CONTEXT.description: HIGH GLUCOSE context to mark time windows where insulin treatment is needed, derived from steady glucose measurements

LOW_GLUCOSE_CONTEXT.name: LOW_GLUCOSE_CONTEXT
LOW_GLUCOSE_CONTEXT.description: LOW GLUCOSE context to mark time windows where insulin treatment is dangerous (risk for hypoglycemia)

MEAL_CONTEXT.name: MEAL_CONTEXT
MEAL_CONTEXT.description: Meal event, with context window around meal times

METFORMIN_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.name: METFORMIN_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT
METFORMIN_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.description: Context to identify if METFORMIN medications administration at home is chronic

REACTIVE_INSULIN_BITZUA_CONTEXT.name: REACTIVE_INSULIN_BITZUA_CONTEXT
REACTIVE_INSULIN_BITZUA_CONTEXT.description: Insulin (bolus/ IV) influence context, to cover for high glucose levels

SGLT2_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.name: SGLT2_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT
SGLT2_HOME_BITZUA_CONTEXT.description: Context to identify if SGLT2 medications administration at home is chronic, which will affect compliance patterns

BMI_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION.name: BMI_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION
BMI_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION.description: Captures if BMI (Body Mass Index) or weight were measured within reasonable time of admission. The data process place a BMI/ weight instance if was measured 6 month prior to admission.

CONTINUE_BASAL_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.name: CONTINUE_BASAL_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN
CONTINUE_BASAL_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.description: Captures if BASAL_BITZUA was performed within reasonable time of admission, assuming patient is regularly treated at home

CONTINUE_METFORMIN_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.name: CONTINUE_METFORMIN_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN
CONTINUE_METFORMIN_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.description: Captures if perscribed METFORMIN medications were stopped during the first 3 days of admission, with no compliance

CREATININE_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION.name: CREATININE_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION
CREATININE_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION.description: Captures if CREATININE (Serum) was performed within reasonable time of admission

INSULIN_ON_HYPERGLYCEMIA_PATTERN.name: INSULIN_ON_HYPERGLYCEMIA_PATTERN
INSULIN_ON_HYPERGLYCEMIA_PATTERN.description: Captures if reactive INSULIN (BOLUS/IV) was performed within proximity to a meal, assuming glucose was high at the time

REDUCE_BASAL_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTERN.name: REDUCE_BASAL_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTERN
REDUCE_BASAL_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTERN.description: Captures if long term INSULIN (BASAL) was reduced after low glucose measured (if was given within 24h of the event, ignores otherwise)

REDUCE_BOLUS_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTERN.name: REDUCE_BOLUS_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTERN
REDUCE_BOLUS_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTERN.description: Captures if short term INSULIN (BOLUS) was reduced after low glucose measured (if was given within 24h of the event, ignores otherwise)

STOP_ANTIDIABETICS_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.name: STOP_ANTIDIABETICS_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN
STOP_ANTIDIABETICS_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.description: Captures if perscribed antidiabetic medications with high hypo risk were stopped during the first 3 days of admission

STOP_ANTIDIABETICS_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTE.name: STOP_ANTIDIABETICS_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTERN
STOP_ANTIDIABETICS_ON_HYPOGLYCEMIA_PATTE.description: Captures if perscribed antidiabetic medications were stopped for 72 hours after hypoglycemia event

STOP_SGLT2_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.name: STOP_SGLT2_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN
STOP_SGLT2_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN.description: Captures if perscribed antidiabetic medications with high hypo risk were stopped during the first 3 days of admission

ROUTINE_BASAL_DOSAGE_PATTERN.name: ROUTINE_BASAL_DOSAGE_PATTERN
ROUTINE_BASAL_DOSAGE_PATTERN.description: Captures if Basal was given at least once a day and no more than 4 times within 14 days of admission, with correct dosage compared to body weight

ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_PATTERN.name: ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_PATTERN
ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_PATTERN.description: Captures if glucose measurement was performed routinly every 24 hours, 3 times if glucose level is above 180, else 1 time

ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION_PAT.name: ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION_PATTERN
ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_ON_ADMISSION_PAT.description: Captures if glucose measurement was performed routinly every 24 hours for the first 2-3 days, depending on diabetes status

ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_ON_STEROIDS_PATT.name: ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_ON_STEROIDS_PATTERN
ROUTINE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE_ON_STEROIDS_PATT.description: Captures if glucose measurement was performed routinly every 24 hours, 3 times if patient is treated with steroids in hospital
